name: Anime Epic
description: High-production anime — Attack on Titan / Jujutsu Kaisen level visual intensity
art_style: High-budget Japanese anime production, dynamic action lines, sakuga-quality key frames. Studio MAPPA / ufotable-tier rendering with intense lighting effects, volumetric fog, and razor-sharp character silhouettes.
color_palette: High contrast darks with vivid accent colors — electric blues, crimson reds, neon purples against deep black backgrounds. Occasional warm amber for emotional scenes.
quality_tags: Anime key frame, sakuga quality, cinematic widescreen, studio-quality cel shading, dynamic camera angle, volumetric lighting, detailed background art.
negative_prompt: 3D render, photorealistic, western cartoon, chibi, low effort, flat coloring, sketch, rough draft, blurry, low quality, AI artifacts, extra fingers, distorted anatomy, text overlays, watermarks, generic stock look.
